summary: Iteration 41 - Multi-Format File Support for Admin Royalty Import. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <option> element - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: CSV import still works (standard multi-artist format)
Backend: XLSX import works (standard multi-artist format)
Backend: Retail ranking format (no artist column) requires artist_id - returns 400
Backend: Retail ranking format with artist_id returns file_format='retail_ranking'
Backend: Retail daily format (Zojak Evolution style) returns file_format='retail_daily'
Backend: Auto-revenue estimation at $0.004/stream when no revenue column
Backend: artist_id form field assigns all rows to selected artist
Backend: Unsupported file format (.txt) correctly rejected with 400
Backend: Template selector still works with DistroKid template
Backend: Import history endpoint loads correctly
Backend: Admin dashboard endpoint works
Backend: Admin users endpoint works
Backend: Admin templates endpoint works
Backend: Admin reconciliation endpoint works
Backend: CSV export has Kalmori Distribution branding (first line)
Backend: Label royalties endpoint works (export-only)
Backend: Real ranking.xlsx file imported successfully
Backend: Real evolutions.xlsx file imported successfully
Frontend: Admin Royalty Import page has 3 tabs (Import & Upload, Distributor Templates, Reconciliation)
Frontend: Artist selector dropdown shows 55 platform users
Frontend: File input accepts .csv, .xlsx, .xls, .pdf extensions
Frontend: Format tags present (CSV green, XLSX purple, PDF red)
Frontend: Import history shows XLSX imports with correct format detection (retail_daily, retail_ranking)
Frontend: Distributor Templates tab shows 3 templates (CD Baby, DistroKid, RouteNote)
Frontend: Reconciliation tab shows summary cards and duplicate/discrepancy tables
Frontend: Label Dashboard Payouts tab has export-only functionality (CSV/PDF buttons)
Frontend: Label Dashboard does NOT have import functionality (confirmed)
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-format file support correctly implemented: CSV, XLSX, PDF all accepted
Artist selector dropdown correctly shows all platform users for single-artist report assignment
Auto-revenue estimation at $0.004/stream working when no revenue column exists
Single-artist reports correctly require artist_id selection (400 error without it)
Template selector still works alongside artist selector
Kalmori Distribution branding present in CSV export (white-label requirement met)
Import history correctly shows file format detection results
seed_data_creation: Multiple test imports created during testing (CSV, XLSX files with various formats)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested multi-format file support for admin royalty import. The system now accepts: (1) CSV files, (2) Excel (.xlsx/.xls) files, (3) PDF files with tabular data. For single-artist reports (like Zojak platform reports without artist column), admin must select which artist the file belongs to via dropdown. Revenue is auto-estimated at $0.004/stream when no revenue column exists. The system auto-detects 3 formats: 'standard' (multi-artist with artist column), 'retail_daily' (daily streams per platform like Zojak Evolution), 'retail_ranking' (platform ranking with stream totals). Real Zojak files at /tmp/ranking.xlsx and /tmp/evolutions.xlsx were successfully imported. All existing admin endpoints still work. Label Dashboard Payouts tab has export-only functionality.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

form_fields.template_id: Optional - distributor template for column mapping
form_fields.artist_id: Optional - assigns all rows to selected artist (required for single-artist reports)

returns.file_format: string (retail_daily, retail_ranking, or standard) - only for special formats

file_format_detection.retail_daily: Has Retail/Platform column + date columns (Zojak Evolution style)
file_format_detection.retail_ranking: Has Retail/Platform column + Streams/Proportion columns (Zojak Ranking style)

POST /api/admin/royalties/import.auto_revenue_estimation: $0.004 per stream when no revenue column exists

artist_selector.location: Admin Royalty Import page - Import & Upload tab
artist_selector.purpose: Assign all rows to selected artist for single-artist reports

file_format_tags.location: Admin Royalty Import page - dropzone area
